title: 2 Pack Plug in Night Light with Dusk to Dawn Photocell Sensor, 5 Adjustable Brightness Levels, ON/Off/AUTO Modes, 3000K Warm White LED Night Light for Baby, Hallways, Stairs, Bedrooms, Kitchens, 0.3W
features: Energy-Saving Automatic Night Light: Powers on ONLY during nighttime darkness, conserving energy. Provides essential nighttime safety lighting for hallways, stairs, or bathrooms without wasting power during daylight hours,(No motion detection)

5 Adjustable Night lamp Brightness Levels: Select from 20%, 40%, 60%, 80% or 100% brightness to suit different lighting needs and environments. Experience tailored comfort and safety with this plug in night light

AUTO/ON/OFF Modes: In AUTO, plug-in night lights activate solely based on ambient light, turning on in darkness and off at sunrise. (No motion detection). You can also manually select the ON/OFF mode by sliding the switch
Built in Dusk to Dawn Sensor: Automatically turns on at dusk and off at dawn, according to your environment’s lighting conditions for convenience
3000K Warm White Light: The night light diffused a soft light through a translucent atomized shade, reducing glare and providing a gentle, relaxing glow
Perfect for Multiple Areas: Ideal for use in hallways, stairways, bedrooms, living rooms, kitchens, and garages, also suitable as a baby night light for newborns
Long-Lasting: Consumes only 0.3W of power and has a long lifespan of up to 60,000 hours, making it an durable choice for your home
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Bed Lamp 2 Hallway Light 3 Stair Light 4 Washbasin Light 5 Room Light How does the automatic mode of this socket night light work? The night light has a built-in light sensor. When it detects dimming, it automatically turns on a soft light. When the ambient light brightens, it automatically turns off, saving energy. Is the light from the night light glaring? Is it suitable for a baby's room or bedroom? This night light uses a 2700K soft warm white light source. The light is diffused, making it gentle and non-glaring, and won't disturb you or your baby's sleep. Can I adjust the brightness or color of the light? The night light supports 5 levels of adjustment to meet the brightness needs of different scenarios.
